mechanics.excerpt: Waterly hoped to cripple the Inner Sphere and the Clans through this bold gam- bit, enabling her ComStar loyalists to seize power; The strikes failed; upon Focht s return from Tukayyid, ne deposed Waterly and began massive reform of ComStar: VICTORY AND CANGE The end of the Clan invasion brought other changes in its wake Hanse Davion died of massive heart altack at the end the war Chancellor Romano Liao tne Capellan Confederation died at the hands of an assassin eaving her son Sun-Tzu on the Celestial Throne.
